article.headline: Old Dominion 94, Virginia Tech 92 (OT)
article.story: BLACKSBURG, Va. (AP) -- Isaiah Hunter made two free throws with 17 seconds left in overtime Thursday night to lead Old Dominion to a 94-92 victory over Virginia Tech. The Monarchs (1-2) missed two free throws with 6 seconds left in overtime, and the Hokies rebounded and pushed the ball up the court for a last-second shot. Jamon Gordon's jumper missed with 2 seconds left, and the tip-in attempt by Mykhael Lattimore at the buzzer did not go in. Hunter scored 21 points for the Monarchs, while John Waller was 4-of-5 from 3-point range and had 18 points. Bryant Matthews led the Hokies (3-2) with 36 points and 12 rebounds, while Gordon added 18 points and nine rebounds. Gordon made a jumper with 8 seconds left in overtime to pull the Hokies within 94-92. Virginia Tech fouled to stop the clock, but the Monarchs went 7-of-8 from the free throw line in overtime. After two free throws by Zabian Dowdell gave Virginia Tech an 85-82 lead with 7 seconds left in regulation, Troy Nance made a 3-pointer at the buzzer to send the game into overtime.
